title: xyris longibracteata
intro: Xyris longibracteata is a species of plant in the family Xyridaceae, commonly known as the yellow-eyed grass or golden eye, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and long bracts. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xyris longibracteata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, often used as natural remedies for various health concerns.
